---
title: "LibreOffice Calc Essentials"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Master spreadsheet fundamentals with this open-source alternative in just 2 hours"
description: "Learn the essentials of LibreOffice Calc, a powerful and free spreadsheet application that provides a viable alternative to Microsoft Excel, with hands-on practice of key features and functions."
page-layout: custom
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .m { --c: #F5A623; }
        .ml-content { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 1.5rem; }
        .ml-content h1, .ml-content h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-top: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; padding-bottom: 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ml-content h1, [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ml-content h2 { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }
        .ml-content h3 { font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; }
        .ml-content h1:first-child, .ml-content h2:first-child { margin-top: 0; }
        .ml-content p { color: var(--g, #86868b); line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .ml-content ul, .ml-content ol { color: var(--g, #86868b); line-height: 1.8; padding-left: 1.25rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
        .ml-content li { padding: 0.2rem 0; }
        .ml-content strong { color: inherit; font-weight: 600; }
        .ml-meta { display: flex; gap: 1.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
        .ml-meta-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--g, #86868b); }
        .ml-meta-item i { color: var(--c); }
        .ml-card { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.02); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-radius: 16px; padding: 2rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .ml-card { background: rgba(245,166,35,0.04); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }
        .ml-card h3, .ml-card h4 { margin-top: 0; border: none; padding-bottom: 0; }
        .ml-related { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 1.25rem; }
        @media (max-width: 767px) { .ml-related { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        </style>
date-modified: last-modified
categories:
  - productivity
  - spreadsheets
  - data-analysis
  - open-source
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Microlearning</div>
    <h1>LibreOffice Calc Essentials</h1>
    <p>Learn the fundamentals of this powerful open-source spreadsheet application in just 2 hours</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.ml-content}

# Session Overview

This 2-hour microlearning session introduces LibreOffice Calc, a powerful open-source spreadsheet application that serves as a free alternative to Microsoft Excel. Whether you're switching from proprietary software, need to work with spreadsheets in a cross-platform environment, or simply want to learn spreadsheet skills without expensive software, this session will equip you with the essential skills to create, edit, and analyze data effectively in Calc.

## What You'll Learn

- Navigate and customize the LibreOffice Calc interface
- Create, format, and organize spreadsheet data
- Apply formulas and functions for calculations
- Generate charts and visualizations
- Use data analysis tools for insight
- Import and export data in various formats
- Understand key differences from Microsoft Excel

# Session Curriculum

## Part 1: Getting Started with LibreOffice Calc (30 minutes)

- Introduction to LibreOffice and the Calc application
- Interface overview and navigation
- Workbook and worksheet structure
- Cell references and basic data entry
- Customizing the interface and preferences
- Saving, exporting, and compatibility considerations

## Part 2: Core Spreadsheet Skills (40 minutes)

- Cell formatting and styles
- Working with rows, columns, and ranges
- Basic formulas and calculations
- Essential functions (SUM, AVERAGE, COUNT, MAX, MIN)
- Relative vs. absolute cell references
- Sorting and filtering data
- Using named ranges effectively

## Part 3: Advanced Features and Analysis (40 minutes)

- Creating and customizing charts
- Conditional formatting for visual analysis
- Working with multiple sheets and linking data
- Pivot tables for data summarization
- Data validation and form controls
- Text functions and data cleanup
- Templates and reusable spreadsheets

## Part 4: Tips, Tricks, and Troubleshooting (10 minutes)

- Keyboard shortcuts for efficiency
- Common issues and how to resolve them
- Excel compatibility tips
- Resources for continued learning
- Automation possibilities with macros (brief introduction)

# Learning Outcomes

By the end of this microlearning session, you will be able to:

- Create structured and well-formatted spreadsheets in LibreOffice Calc
- Apply formulas and functions to perform calculations
- Generate insightful charts and data visualizations
- Use data analysis tools like filtering and pivot tables
- Navigate compatibility considerations with other spreadsheet applications
- Apply best practices for spreadsheet organization and maintenance

# Teaching Methods

This session combines:

- Live demonstrations
- Hands-on exercises with sample data
- Problem-solving challenges
- Collaborative learning
- Real-world application scenarios

# Target Audience

This microlearning session is ideal for:

- Individuals transitioning from proprietary software to open-source alternatives
- Students and educators working in environments where LibreOffice is the standard
- Small business owners and professionals seeking cost-effective software solutions
- Data entry specialists and administrators
- Anyone looking to build foundational spreadsheet skills

# Prerequisites

- Basic computer skills
- No prior spreadsheet experience required, though Excel users will find parallels
- Bring your laptop with LibreOffice installed (installation instructions will be provided)

# Materials

All participants will receive:

- Sample spreadsheets for practice
- Formula and function cheat sheet
- Keyboard shortcut reference guide
- Excel to Calc transition guide
- List of resources for continued learning

:::

```{=html}
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="ml-content">
    <div class="ml-card">
      <h3>Your Instructor</h3>
      <p><strong>CHENIST Team</strong> — Data Analyst & Open Source Advocate</p>
      <p>Sophie has over 8 years of experience working with spreadsheets for data analysis and has helped dozens of organizations transition from proprietary software to open-source alternatives like LibreOffice.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="ml-card">
      <h3>What Participants Say</h3>
      <p><em>"I was nervous about switching from Excel to Calc for my small business, but this session made the transition seamless. I can now do everything I need without expensive software subscriptions."</em></p>
      <p><strong>— Carlos M., Small Business Owner</strong></p>
    </div>

    <h3>Related Offerings</h3>
    <div class="ml-related">
      <div class="ml-card">
        <h4>Data Analysis Fundamentals</h4>
        <p>A comprehensive course on data analysis techniques using open-source tools including LibreOffice Calc and Python.</p>
        <a href="/academy/courses.html" class="m-bo">Learn More</a>
      </div>
      <div class="ml-card">
        <h4>SC-IM Spreadsheet Session</h4>
        <p>Explore SC-IM, a powerful terminal-based spreadsheet application for advanced users and server environments.</p>
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/sc-im/" class="m-bo">Learn More</a>
      </div>
      <div class="ml-card">
        <h4>Complete LibreOffice Suite Workshop</h4>
        <p>A full-day workshop covering all major applications in the LibreOffice suite, including Writer, Calc, Impress, and Base.</p>
        <a href="/academy/trainings.html" class="m-bo">Learn More</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>LibreOffice Calc Essentials</h2>
    <p>Interested in this program? Get in touch to learn more.</p>
    <a href="/contact.html" class="m-lk">Contact Us</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
